name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-12
title: rabbit-triage.py validates feature_dir exists after dereferencing for basename
description: scripts/rabbit-triage.py line 74 derives feature_basename via os.path.realpath(feature_dir) but does not check feature_dir exists until line 79. If feature_dir is a non-existent path, realpath silently returns the absolute version and the script proceeds to look for bug.json under the wrong feature name. Reorder: check feature_dir exists first, then realpath.
